title: Intensely Savory British Beef Stew
description: A hearty and comforting British beef stew with a rich, mustardy flavor, tender beef, and a hint of sweetness from amazake, all made keto-friendly and finished with a dramatic flambe
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat
Add the beef to the pot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes
Remove the browned beef from the pot and set it aside
Add the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter to the pot and cook until melted
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until it is softened and lightly browned, about 5 minutes
Add the minced garlic to the pot and cook for 1 minute
Add the amazake, Dijon mustard, thyme, salt, and black pepper to the pot and cook for 1 minute
Add the browned beef back to the pot and pour in the beef broth
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 1/2 hours
Stir in the brandy and cook for an additional 10 minutes
Ignite the brandy with a match and let it flambe for 30 seconds to 1 minute
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh thyme
